title: leucas decemdentata var. decemdentata
intro: Leucas decemdentata var. decemdentata, also known as Decemdentata leucas, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Leucas decemdentata var. decemdentata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and alleviate symptoms of fever and cough. Leucas decemdentata var. decemdentata is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
